ArenaX Beta

The competitive gaming hub you deserve

ArenaX brings together tournaments, team-finding, communities, and live streaming in a single platform built for players who take their game seriously.

Enlist FreeView tournaments

1000+

Registered players

100+

10+

Games in the Grid

24 / 7

Live streams

Our mission

Our mission is simple: give every player — from weekend warriors to aspiring pros — a single home where they can compete, connect, and grow.

Our Vision

We envision a world where competitive gaming is as accessible and rewarding as playing itself. A world where every player can find their community, test their skills, and compete at the highest level — all without leaving the platform.

Founded2026
HQRemote — worldwide
ModelFree to play, fair monetisation

Everything on one platform

Six core features, all interconnected. Your tournament history shows on your profile, and it all fits together.

🏆

The Arena

Forge or enter competitive tournaments across your favourite titles. War maps, prize pools, and live bracket updates — all in one place.

Explore →🎮

Game Library

Browse the Grid of supported titles and add your favourites to your Loadout.

Explore →🤝

TeamUP Arena

Open a draft in the Mercenary Market or browse open squads. Filter by game, rank, and play style to assemble your dream roster.

Explore →💬

The Nexus

Jump into The Nexus, drop clips, debate meta, and link up with players in the same trenches as you.

Explore →📡

Spectate

Spectate community members broadcasting live. Going live yourself is one click away — no external setup required.

Explore →

What we stand for

Four values that shape every product decision we make.

⚔️

Compete Fiercely

We believe competition forges the best players. Every feature is built to help you peak and stay there.

🌐

Play Together

Gaming is better with a squad. We remove every obstacle between you and your next teammate, community, and rival.

🔒

Fair & Safe

Our platform enforces fair play and keeps your data yours. No selling profiles, no pay-to-win matchmaking.

📈

Grow Continuously

Learn from every match, sharpen your strategy, and keep pushing toward your next win.

The Team

A small crew of competitive gamers who got tired of switching between five tabs just to play one game.

Enlist in seconds. No credit card, no hidden fees — just you, your games, and the competition.
